title: calamus boniensis
intro: Calamus boniensis, also known as Sichuan flag or Sichuan sweet rush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Calamus boniensis include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
